description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a solid wooden stock and foregrip, both finished in a rich brown color. The receiver and barrel assembly are rendered in matte black, giving the weapon a robust and utilitarian appearance. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, while the foregrip provides stability during firing. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending forward with no visible muzzle device attached. The magazine is a straight, box-type, inserted vertically beneath the receiver. There are no visible advanced sighting systems, only basic iron sights integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel.
description: A classic rifle with a fixed wooden stock, matte black receiver and barrel, and a straight box magazine. Features basic iron sights and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, foregrip, and straight box magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the stock and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden components and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
